description.value: The clover signifies luck, and you have a limitless supply. While maintaining this stance, you may treat all natural 1s on damage dice as 2s instead. In addition, your d20 rolls that land on a natural 1 do not automatically fail (though they may still fail due to being too low to beat the target DC). Finally, once per round, you may reroll a single attack you made that missed the target. If the attack was negated by a counter's opposed roll, use the new roll for the opposed roll. If an effect such as concealment or a mirror image spell caused the miss, you may reroll that effect instead.
